TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Frank_Baumholtz, title = Frank_Baumholtz, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frank_Baumholtz} }

S.FORM: Frank Baumholtz sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1918, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 10, Frank Baumholtz, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1997) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Frank Baumholtz sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1918, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 10, Frank Baumholtz, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1997) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *rank βaumħoltz s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *rank βaumħoltz, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
